notes: PDFs and other files are still uploaded and stored when ingested. If a file matches any rule below, the worker skips extraction, chunking, embeddings, and theme/narrative extraction. Use sha256 for an exact file (see ingest logs or Admin ingest jobs). Use filename_globs with shell-style patterns on the basename only. Use source_uri_contains for path fragments from the local watcher (source_uri is the full local path when using the ingest client). After removing a rule, use Admin → Requeue failed ingest jobs (also requeues skipped) to process again.
